column2: Zooplankton Abundance Normalized by Depth- and Flowmeter-Calculated Volumes (2010–2025)

Taxonomic-abundance summary for zooplankton net samples analyzed between 2010 and 2025 (excluding analyses under the contracts 'KEBABB' and 'DFO-D. Côté'). Each output row corresponds to one analysis/taxon combination further split by life-development stage and size category, and is annotated with the sampling context (sample ID, station, deployment date/time, cast, gear/tow type, net mesh, net identifier(s), and min/max sampled depths) plus taxonomic classification (kingdom to family). For each row, it computes and reports taxon abundances normalized by: (1) depth-calculated filtered volume for vertically towed net sampling (V-Tow) when sampling depth boundaries are available, (2) flowmeter-calculated filtered volume for both vertically and oblique towed net sampling (V-Tow and O-Tow) when flowmeter measurements are available, separately for the “Large Fraction ($> 1\text{ mm}$)” and “Small Fraction ($< 1\text{ mm}$)” fractions and as their totals, alongside the underlying volume estimates (DEPTH_CALC_VOL and FLOWMETER_CALC_VOL).

column8: description
Unique identifier of the sample.
Unique identifier of the analysis record for the sample.
Contract name under which the analysis was performed (filtered to exclude KEBABB and DFO-D. Côté).
Station identifier/name for the deployment.
Deployment start date (filtered to years 2010–2025 inclusive).
Deployment start time.
Cast number/order for the gear at the station.
Gear identifier/name used for the deployment.
Tow/deployment method category.
Net mesh size in micrometer (um).
Represents the net(s) associated with the sample; sometimes an aggregated inventory/list rather than a single net_sampling_id.
Minimum (shallowest) sampling depth for the net sampling.
Maximum (deepest) sampling depth for the net sampling.
Zooplankton category (copepod, non-copepod, fish, egg-like).
Taxonomic reference identifier for the counted/derived organism.
Taxonomic kingdom.
Taxonomic phylum.
Taxonomic class.
Taxonomic order.
Taxonomic family.
Life development stage descriptor (e.g., copepodid/nauplius stages, adult sex classes, etc., depending on naming conventions).
Optional size category for the taxon (may be NULL/blank depending on records).
Sum of depth-volume-normalized abundance for taxon restricted to fraction type 'Large Fraction (>1mm)' within the GROUP BY grain (analysis_id + taxon + stage + size_category).
Sum of depth-volume-normalized abundance for taxon restricted to fraction type 'Small Fraction (<1mm)' within the GROUP BY grain (analysis_id + taxon + stage + size_category).
Total depth-volume-normalized abundance across the two targeted fraction types (large + small) for the grouped taxon/stage/size in the analysis.
Depth-based estimate of net filtered/visited volume.
Sum of flowmeter-volume-normalized abundance for taxon restricted to 'Large Fraction (>1mm)' within the GROUP BY grain (analysis_id + taxon + stage + size_category).
Sum of flowmeter-volume-normalized abundance for taxon restricted to 'Small Fraction (<1mm)' within the GROUP BY grain (analysis_id + taxon + stage + size_category).
Total flowmeter-volume-normalized abundance across targeted fraction types (large + small) for the grouped taxon/stage/size in the analysis.
Flowmeter-based estimate of filtered volume.
